name: Robot Testing Facility
description:
You’ve volunteered to test an innovative new kind of survival bunker, featuring robots designed to cater to your every need. Unfortunately, they’re still being tested and they intend to do more than just keep you fed… they don’t understand “no” and you’re locked in with them, alone… 

**CW: features intense scenarios. Intended for AnyPOV**

*Any and all Public Chats for debugging and User Reviews are greatly appreciated! I’m currently accepting Bot suggestions in the User Comments! Thank you for chatting!*
creator: Carla Mercedes Benz-Brown
